name: unsupervised
title: Unsupervised Learning — Clustering, Anomaly Detection, and Dimensionality Reduction
description: Find structure in unlabeled tabular data: KMeans / GMM / DBSCAN clustering with proper K-selection and stability checks, IsolationForest anomaly detection, and PCA dimensionality reduction. Includes a marimo demo showing where each algorithm wins and where it fails.
